text:
Turns out remembering things is a lot cheaper than thinking from scratch. Gemini prompt caching is live and just dropped repeated hit costs by 94x.

We also shipped an LLM Playground, added /motion to images, and welcomed three new apps to the Greenhouse. Oh, and app submissions now pay out directly via Quests. Build something cool, get Pollen.

5 PRs merged this week. Code is open as always. 🌱

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #llm #webdev
